changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_logging_changes_to_network_configurations to k8s_audit_logging_network_config_changes for clarity and brevity
review_notes: The control CA-7(5) is applicable to Kubernetes as it involves continuous monitoring and consistency analysis, which can be implemented using NetworkPolicies, audit logging, and admission controllers. The function names mostly follow the naming conventions, but one function name was adjusted for clarity. The functions are technically accurate and map well to Kubernetes security controls.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names are concise and clearly describe the check being performed.
title: Continuous Monitoring - Continuous monitoring | consistency analysis employ the following actions to val
step1_reasoning: The control CA-7(5) focuses on continuous monitoring and consistency analysis, particularly for network configurations. In Kubernetes, similar monitoring can be achieved through NetworkPolicies, audit logging for changes in network configurations, and admission controllers that enforce network policies. Additionally, service mesh solutions like Istio can provide enhanced monitoring capabilities for network traffic within the cluster.
